title: Prioritization Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger prioritization foundations judgment so strategy work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Prioritization Foundations is a leverage point inside strategy. It supports the broader goal of vision, positioning, competitive analysis, and strategic planning.
coreConcepts: Prioritization Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good prioritization foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Prioritization Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
